Requirements: ['Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field, or equivalent work experience.', '6+ years of experience in data engineering, with at least 3 years in a leadership or senior engineering role.', 'Demonstrated leadership skills with experience in mentoring, coaching, and guiding a team of data engineers.', 'Strong technical expertise in designing and implementing data pipelines, databases, and analytical tools.', 'Proficiency in programming languages commonly used in data engineering, such as Python and Java.', 'Hands-on experience with big data technologies and frameworks, including Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, and Hive.', 'Experience with analytical tools like Tableau, Power BI, Looker, or other similar platforms.', 'In-depth knowledge of relational and NoSQL databases, along with experience in database design, optimization, and SQL querying.', 'Experience working with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) and data warehousing solutions such as Snowflake, Redshift, or BigQuery.', 'Experience in real-time data processing and streaming technologies, such as Apache Flink or Kafka Streams.', 'Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to predict and evaluate the outcomes of solutions.', 'Excellent communication and collaboration abilities, with experience working effectively in cross-functional teams.', 'Strong sense of responsibility and initiative, demonstrating commitment to goals and deadlines.', 'Self-motivated, proactive, and capable of working independently with minimal supervision.', 'Familiarity with data governance, data security, and compliance standards and best practices.', 'Maintain confidentiality of sensitive information and data.', 'Ability to lead, inspire, and motivate team members in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.', 'Willingness to travel for meetings and collaboration with offshore team members as needed.']
